"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\waveform_analyser.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\waveform_analyser.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\waveform_analyser.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\waveform_analyser.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\Users\Auris\Documents\UWE\Programming\Code\waveform_analyser.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libwaveform_analyser.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\waveform_analyser.dir\linkLibs.rsp
